name: How do I prompt ChatGPT safely for basic legal questions?

mainEntity.name: How do I prompt ChatGPT safely for basic legal questions?

acceptedAnswer.description: Assign role, provide anonymized details/context, omit privileged info, verify outputs.[2] E.g., 'As a paralegal, summarize general [law] without advice.'[1] Key factors: Clear steps reduce errors; still check sources. Use for ideas only; follow with lawyer. Practice on non-sensitive topics.
